# JamJet Documentation — llms.txt
# This file helps AI assistants and crawlers understand the JamJet docs site.
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org

# JamJet is a performance-first, agent-native runtime for AI agents.
# Rust core for durable execution, scheduling, and crash recovery.
# Python SDK and Java SDK for authoring workflows and agents.
# Native MCP (Model Context Protocol) and A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol support.
# Built-in eval harness, coordinator routing, and enterprise security.
# Apache 2.0.

## Product

- Name: JamJet
- Tagline: The agent-native runtime for production AI
- PyPI: jamjet (pip install jamjet)
- Maven Central: jamjet-spring-boot-starter, jamjet-skillsjars, langchain4j-jamjet
- Python SDK version: 0.3.0
- Java SDK version: 0.4.0
- Spring Boot Starter version: 0.1.0
- License: Apache 2.0
- Languages: Python SDK, Java SDK, Rust runtime

## Key capabilities

- Durable execution: every state transition is checkpointed; crash and resume from exactly where you stopped
- Agent strategies: reflection, debate, consensus — pluggable reasoning patterns for multi-step agents
- Coordinator node: dynamic agent routing with structured scoring and optional LLM tiebreaker
- Agent-as-Tool: wrap any agent as a callable tool — sync, streaming with early termination, or conversational with turn limits
- MCP: native client and server — connect any MCP-compatible tool in one line
- A2A: native Agent-to-Agent protocol for cross-framework agent orchestration
- Eval harness: AssertionScorer, LatencyScorer, CostScorer, LlmJudgeScorer, custom scorer plugins — run against JSONL datasets with CI exit codes
- Workflow authoring: Python decorators, Java builders, or YAML — all compile to the same IR
- Enterprise security: multi-tenant isolation, PII redaction, OAuth delegation, mTLS federation, data retention policies
- Observability: OpenTelemetry traces, Micrometer metrics, structured logs for every execution
- Research support: reproducible multi-agent experiments, strategy sweeps, replay, ExperimentGrid

## Documentation structure

This site is the full JamJet documentation, hosted at https://docs.jamjet.dev.

### Overview
- Documentation home: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs
- Quickstart: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/quickstart
- Core Concepts: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/concepts

### Getting Started
- Python SDK: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/python-sdk
- Java SDK: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/java-sdk
- Java Quickstart: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/java-quickstart
- Spring Boot Starter: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/spring-boot-starter
- LangChain4j Integration: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/langchain4j-integration
- CLI Reference: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/cli
- Workflow Authoring (YAML): https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/yaml-workflows

### Guides
- Coordinator Node: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/coordinator
- Agent-as-Tool: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/agent-as-tool
- Eval Harness: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/eval
- Research Guide: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/research-guide
- Observability: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/observability
- Deployment: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/deployment
- Enterprise Security: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/enterprise

### Protocols
- MCP Integration: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/mcp
- A2A Integration: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/a2a

### Reference
- REST API Reference: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/api-reference
- Framework Comparison: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/compare

### Migration Guides
- From LangGraph: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/migrate/from-langgraph
- From CrewAI: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/migrate/from-crewai
- From OpenAI SDK: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs/migrate/from-openai-direct

## Available languages

Documentation is available in 6 languages:
- English: https://docs.jamjet.dev/en/docs
- Japanese: https://docs.jamjet.dev/ja/docs
- Chinese: https://docs.jamjet.dev/zh/docs
- Korean: https://docs.jamjet.dev/ko/docs
- Spanish: https://docs.jamjet.dev/es/docs
- German: https://docs.jamjet.dev/de/docs

## SDK coverage

- **Python SDK** (PyPI: jamjet): decorators, workflow builder, async steps, Pydantic state, MCP client/server, eval harness
- **Java SDK** (Maven Central): builders, records, @Tool annotation, IR compilation, agent strategies
- **Spring Boot Starter** (Maven Central: jamjet-spring-boot-starter): DurabilityAdvisor, audit trails, human-in-the-loop approval, Micrometer metrics, OTel spans, JUnit 5 replay testing
- **LangChain4j Integration** (Maven Central: langchain4j-jamjet): JamjetDurableAgent, JamjetChatMemoryStore — add durability to existing LangChain4j agents without rewriting them

## Repositories

- Main (Rust runtime + Python SDK + Java SDK): https://github.com/jamjet-labs/jamjet
- Spring Boot Starter: https://github.com/jamjet-labs/jamjet-spring
- Documentation: https://github.com/jamjet-labs/jamjet-docs
- Website: https://github.com/jamjet-labs/jamjet.dev
- Examples: https://github.com/jamjet-labs/examples
